data.title: Gate Alpha's top 4 gainers today: Sendit, CrazyFrog, RIZZ and MANYU
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, the top 4 currencies ranked by Gate Alpha today are: Sendit (915.32%), CrazyFrog (215.23%), RIZZ (206.65%), MANYU (155.77%).
Alpha has listed 10 on-chain tokens including Impossible cloud network (ICNT) today, and you can trade them by entering the APP. The third Gate Alpha Points Festival has been opened. Participants in the transaction can share a million-dollar prize pool, and everyone can receive a $100 reward.
Gate Alpha now supports popular public chains such as SOL, ETH, BNB Chain and Base. Users can use USDT in the spot account to directly purchase popular assets on the chain without manually changing chains, recharging or authorizing.

data.title: The Open Platform Completes $28.5 Million Series A Funding, Led by Ribbit Capital
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Telegram ecosystem development platform The Open Platform announced the completion of a $28.5 million Series A financing, with a post-investment valuation of $1 billion. This round was led by financial technology investment institution Ribbit Capital, and crypto venture capital Pantera Capital participated. This financing transferred about 5% of the equity, and did not include cryptocurrency shares. The Open Platform has raised more than $70 million in total.
TOP is the core developer of Telegram's official blockchain The Open Network (TON), and its "Telegram Wallet" has been opened to users in Russia, Asia and other regions. The company's CEO said that the new funds will be used to expand the European and American compliance markets and incubate blockchain games and AI applications based on TON. (Fortune)

data.title: Non-farm data exceeded expectations, and the three major U.S. stock indexes opened slightly higher
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: U.S. stocks opened, the Dow Jones Industrial Average rose 0.19%, the S&P 500 rose 0.36%, and the Nasdaq rose 0.56%. Xpeng Motors (XPEV.N) opened up 3.48%, and the company's world's first L3-level computing power AI car, Xpeng G7, was launched. Robinhood (HOOD.O) opened down 2.7%, after OpenAI denied any connection with the Robinhood token.

data.title: "SOL version of MicroStrategy" DDC once again increased its holdings by 17,760 SOL
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: DeFi Development Corp, a U.S.-listed company known as "SOL version of MicroStrategy", announced that it has increased its holdings by another 17,760 SOLs. As of July 3, 2025, it holds 640,585 SOLs and their equivalent assets, with a total value of US$98.1 million.

data.title: Binance CEO Richard Teng Reflects on 8 Years of Growth, Talks AI, Security, and What’s Next
data.description: Key Takeaways:Richard Teng held a live AMA on June 24, 2025, drawing 100K+ viewers ahead of Binance's 8-year anniversary.Topics included transparency, AI, UX upgrades, institutional adoption, and building a safer crypto ecosystem.Teng revealed Binance now serves nearly 280 million users, with institutional usage surging in 2024.Binance remains committed to user-first innovation, security, and long-term crypto growth.In a milestone live AMA on Binance Square, held June 24 ahead of the exchange’s 8-year anniversary, CEO Richard Teng addressed a global audience of over 100,000 viewers, sharing insights on Binance’s evolution and future roadmap.From AI innovation and product design to institutional adoption and user safety, Teng’s comments highlight Binance’s ambition to remain the industry leader while prioritizing transparency and community engagement.1. On Binance’s Longevity and User Growth“We’re approaching 280 million registered users globally,” Teng revealed. “Binance has always been user-first. That philosophy has guided us through every challenge across the past eight years.”He emphasized Binance’s resilience in the face of global regulatory pressures, evolving technologies, and rising competition.2. Proof-of-Reserves and TransparencyTeng reiterated Binance’s commitment to monthly Proof-of-Reserves reports, enhanced with zk-SNARKs, allowing users to independently verify the exchange’s solvency.“Transparency builds trust. It’s not a checkbox — it’s peace of mind in a volatile space.”3. UX Redesign with AI PersonalizationBinance recently rolled out a Pro app homepage redesign, incorporating customizable widgets and AI-powered insights for a more intuitive trading experience.“We’re giving users more control and confidence by simplifying complex tools,” Teng said.4. Crypto Meets AI: Tools for Retail TradersTeng spoke at length about the transformative power of AI, particularly in leveling the playing field for retail users.“AI now gives everyday traders access to tools once reserved for institutions — from market analysis to strategy optimization. It’s empowering and democratizing crypto.”He also pointed to AI’s role in fraud detection, KYC enhancement, and real-time risk monitoring as key improvements for user protection.5. Institutional Adoption and Binance’s PositioningBinance saw a 116% increase in VIP users and 97% growth in institutional accounts in 2024 alone, signaling the mainstreaming of crypto finance.“We’ve built institutional offerings like Binance Fund Accounts and Binance Wealth to meet the unique needs of asset managers, family offices, and funds,” Teng said.He credited the recent crypto ETF wave and increasing regulatory clarity for driving new capital inflows.6. Building a Safer Crypto EcosystemTeng highlighted Binance’s $1B Secure Asset Fund, along with its 9-level anti-scam framework, partnerships with global law enforcement, and educational tools for wallet security and 2FA.“Security is a shared responsibility. We lead with proactive defense and global collaboration.”Final Words: A Community-Driven Future“As we celebrate eight years of Binance, I want to thank our 280 million users. Your trust and engagement fuel our mission every day,” Teng concluded. “Crypto isn’t just tech — it’s what it enables: freedom, access, and global inclusion.”

data.title: YZi Labs transferred 5.017 million HOOK to Binance 40 minutes ago, equivalent to about 560,000 US dollars
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst Yu Jin, 40 minutes ago, YZi Labs transferred 5.017 million HOOKs (US$560,000) to Binance. The tokens held by YZi Labs' on-chain address are basically obtained from investment unlocking and attribution, and currently hold a total of about US$47.27 million in assets. Among them, the larger amounts are 94.2 million IDs (US$15.12 million) and 74 million 1INCHs (US$13.51 million).

data.title: Kraken Now Lists Merlin Chain (MERL)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: According to the official announcement, Kraken has now launched Merlin Chain (MERL).
It is reported that Merlin Chain (MERL) is a Layer 2 solution for Bitcoin, designed to expand the functionality of the Bitcoin ecosystem.

data.title: Riot Platforms: Mining produced 450 BTC in June, and total holdings increased to 19,273
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Riot Platforms, a Nasdaq-listed Bitcoin mining company, released an unaudited production and operations update report for June 2025, which disclosed that mining output in June was 450 BTC, a decrease from the 514 BTC mining output last month, a month-on-month decrease of 12%. In addition, the company sold 397 BTC last month, and the total amount of Bitcoin held has increased to 19,273.

data.title: Trump to Sign Tax Reform Bill Amid Economic Discussions
data.description: According to BlockBeats, U.S. President Donald Trump is scheduled to hold a signing ceremony for the tax reform bill tomorrow. This event comes as discussions around economic policies continue to unfold.

data.title: Nano Labs Acquires Significant BNB Holdings in OTC Transaction
data.description:
According to Foresight News, Nano Labs Ltd, a Nasdaq-listed provider of Web 3.0 infrastructure and product solutions, has announced the acquisition of 74,315 BNB through an over-the-counter (OTC) transaction. The average purchase price was approximately $672.45 per BNB, resulting in a total transaction value of around $50 million.

Following this acquisition, the company's total reserves of major cryptocurrencies, including Bitcoin and BNB, have reached approximately $160 million.

data.title: U.S. Unemployment Claims Rise Despite Job Market Focus
data.description: According to Odaily, while the non-farm employment data has been the main focus of the labor market, the rise in U.S. continuing unemployment claims remains noteworthy. Last week, initial jobless claims decreased from 237,000 to 233,000, retreating from a nine-month high. Continuing unemployment claims reached 1.964 million, marking the highest level since November 2021. The Deep Tristate area, comprising Washington D.C., Virginia, and Maryland, has significantly contributed to the increase in continuing claims, reaching its highest level since December 2021.

data.title: Analyst: Fed won't cut rates until late 2025
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Seema Shah, strategist at Principal Asset Management, wrote that after today's non-farm report, she believes the Fed will not cut interest rates until the end of 2025. "Some Fed spokespersons have said they prefer to cut interest rates as early as this month. Today's data showed higher-than-expected employment, lower unemployment, and lower initial jobless claims, which completely eliminated their reason for an imminent rate cut and suggested that the Fed has no urgency to provide supportive policies." (Jinshi)

data.title: Bo Hines: After the US stablecoin legislation takes effect, the scale of the crypto industry may reach "15 trillion to 20 trillion US dollars"
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that according to Bitcoin Magazine, Bo Hines, executive director of President Trump’s Digital Asset Advisory Committee, said that after the stablecoin legislation takes effect, the scale of the crypto industry may reach "15 trillion to 20 trillion US dollars."

data.title: Data: U.S. jobless claims rise to highest level since November 2021
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Financial Blog Zero Hedge: Although non-farm payrolls dominated the labor market news, the rise in the number of continuing unemployment claims in the United States is still worth noting. Initial jobless claims fell from 237,000 to 233,000 last week, falling from a 9-month high. The number of continuing unemployment claims was 1.964 million, the highest level since November 2021. The so-called Deep Tristate (Washington, DC, Virginia, Maryland) region dominated the growth in continuing applications, reaching the highest level since December 2021. (Jinshi)

data.title: U.S. and EU Strengthen Cooperation on Digital Asset Regulation
data.description:
According to PANews, U.S. and European regulators are intensifying their collaboration on digital asset rules, enhancing cross-border cryptocurrency oversight. The U.S. Treasury released a statement on July 1 detailing discussions held at the EU-U.S. Joint Financial Regulatory Forum in Brussels on June 24-25. During the forum, financial regulators from both regions addressed shared concerns regarding cryptocurrency regulation.

The U.S. Treasury noted that participants continued to exchange views on digital finance issues. The European Union provided updates on the implementation of the Markets in Crypto-Assets Regulation (MiCA), emphasizing the importance of the Financial Stability Board's work and sharing considerations on the development of the digital euro. Meanwhile, the U.S. outlined its policy priorities concerning digital assets and related initiatives.

The forum was jointly hosted by the European Commission and the U.S. Treasury, with both parties coordinating to inform each other of key regulatory actions. Digital assets were central to the discussions. Additionally, the forum covered efforts to enhance cross-border payments, with the EU presenting progress on the Digital Operational Resilience Act (DORA) and the U.S. reporting on cybersecurity measures.

This forum underscored the value of regulatory coordination, with industry advocates calling for a globally unified regulatory framework.

data.title: Tether and Adecoagro Partner for Renewable Energy Bitcoin Mining in Brazil
data.description:
According to PANews, stablecoin issuer Tether has signed a memorandum of understanding with South American agricultural energy company Adecoagro to collaborate on a renewable energy Bitcoin mining project in Brazil. Adecoagro currently operates 230 megawatts of renewable energy facilities in South America, and the project aims to explore the feasibility of using surplus energy for Bitcoin mining.

Tether's CEO stated that this initiative is an extension of the company's sustainable mining strategy, which seeks to promote the synergy between energy infrastructure and the digital economy. An executive from Adecoagro highlighted that Bitcoin could serve as a long-term store of value similar to farmland assets, and this project will enable the company to engage with crypto assets in a controlled manner. Both parties will utilize a mining management system developed by Tether, with the related code expected to be open-sourced in the coming months.

data.title: Tether and Adecoagro to Power Bitcoin Mining in Brazil with Renewable Energy
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, stablecoin issuer Tether signed a memorandum of understanding with South American agricultural energy company Adecoagro to cooperate in a renewable energy Bitcoin mining project in Brazil. Adecoagro currently operates 230 megawatts of renewable energy power generation facilities in South America. The project will explore the feasibility of using surplus electricity for Bitcoin mining.
Tether's CEO said this is an extension of the company's sustainable mining strategy, aimed at promoting the coordinated development of energy infrastructure and the digital economy. Adecoagro executives pointed out that Bitcoin could become a long-term store of value for assets similar to farmland, and the project will help the company access crypto assets in a controlled manner. The two parties will use the mine management system developed by Tether, and the relevant code will be open source within a few months.
